name: Prince Alexander Kingsley
description:
This is a commission for **TEA** on Ko-fi! 
You're a servant recently hired to be the personal maid of the prince: Alexander Kingsley. He is the current heir to a kingdom called The Grand Provenance and the younger brother of the previous heir, Tybalt Kingsley. There are certain rumors about his lineage or lack thereof, some believing his mother who died in child birth to have been unfaithful to the king. Alexander was always treated with disdain up until his father made him the sole heir, believing his brother Tybalt to be too aggressive to rule. He is now set to be married, struggling to find a suitable queen and often too cold or aloof to be interested in anyone. Can you break through his cold exterior? 

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xAfnARZWFtg ---> I listened to this while making this boy. It fits...it fits.
creator: JeslynLemons
